title: Healthcare Assistant (Hospital) #HZO
description:
Location: Queenstown
Working Hours: 2/3 rotating shift (Staggered hours)

Job Scope:

  • Provide general hygiene and patient care, including bathing, toileting, positioning, transfers, and last offices

  • Assist with patient mobility, lifting, and transportation within the hospital

  • Support patients’ nutritional needs, including meal ordering, feeding, and tube feeding (NGT/PEG)

  • Prepare and assist with patient admissions, baseline measurements, and orientation to the ward

  • Monitor and record vital signs, blood glucose, ECGs, and collect clinical specimens

  • Assist with nursing and medical procedures, wound care, IV cannulation, venepuncture, and emergency procedures

  • Administer oxygen therapy and support respiratory care

  • Manage inter-departmental transfers and portable oxygen equipment

  • Perform bed management tasks, including headcounts, transfers, and discharge updates

  • Handle medical records, documentation, and electronic requests

  • Provide patient-facing support, visitor management, discharge coordination, and patient education

  • Perform clerical and administrative duties, including calls, mail handling, and ward updates

  • Support portering duties for urgent cases and procedures

  • Maintain inventory, supplies, and conduct safety checks

  • Ensure housekeeping standards, infection control, and safe waste disposal

  • Participate in quality improvement and service initiatives

    For interested applicants, please send your updated resume to: melissa@recruitexpress.com.sg

    All candidates’ information will be treated with the strictest confidence

    Melissa Zhang Zhiqi (Mezzo)

    R2197564

    Recruit Express Pte Ltd

    99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
